title: Right Side Activity Bar
description: A test extension that moves the Activity Bar and the Sidebar (Explorer, Search, Extensions) entirely to the right side of the IDE.
icon: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="2"/><line x1="16" y1="3" x2="16" y2="21"/></svg>
